title: crotalaria leptocarpa subsp. aberrans
intro: Crotalaria leptocarpa subsp. aberrans is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Crotalaria leptocarpa subsp. aberrans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
